description: REAL DEMO: Take a famous speech audio clip, transcribe it via Whisper, translate to French via NLLB, then re-synthesize as French audio via Edge-TTS. All Spaces are LIVE on HuggingFace.
Transcribe a Hindi audio clip and produce a concise English summary (max 100 words).
Transcribe French audio and translate the transcript to English.
Transcribe English meeting audio and produce sentiment per speaker.
Transcribe French audio, translate to English, then re-synthesize as English speech.
Transcribe a customer service call and classify the customer's sentiment.
Caption an image and translate the caption to French.
Extract text from an image (OCR), then translate to Spanish.
Caption an image, then classify the emotional tone of the caption.
OCR a screenshot of an article, then summarize the extracted text.
Caption an image with detailed descriptions of objects present.
Extract main text from a PDF and produce a 3-sentence summary.
Extract named entities (people, orgs, locations) from a news article.

input.article_text: Acme Corp CEO Jane Doe announced new operations in Tokyo and Berlin...

description: Extract a French PDF, translate to English, then summarize.
Extract entities from text, then translate the entity names to French.

input.article_text: Acme Corp CEO Jane Doe is expanding to Tokyo.

description: Quick summary of a short article (no PDF parsing needed).

input.article_text: A long article passage about technology trends...

description: Explain a Python snippet, then translate the explanation to Hindi.

input.code_snippet:
def fib(n):
    return n if n < 2 else fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)

description: Explain a code snippet in 2 sentences.
Explain a long code snippet, then summarize the explanation.
Explain a code snippet in French.
Explain a code snippet, then synthesize the explanation as audio.
Given a news image and audio commentary, produce a unified summary.
Given a food image and description, produce a recipe summary in Spanish.

input.description: A traditional dish from Italy with pasta and tomato sauce.

description: From a meeting recording (audio) and a whiteboard photo (image), produce structured notes.
Caption an image, then speak the caption aloud as French audio.
From a Spanish audio clip, produce: English transcript, sentiment analysis, and a French summary.
Given a rough image idea in plain text, refine it into a detailed diffusion prompt and generate the image using FLUX.1-schnell. Output the image URL and the refined prompt.

input.rough_idea: a peaceful garden at sunset with a small wooden bench

description: Generate an image from prompt. There are two versions of FLUX available: FLUX.1-schnell (fast, ~7s) and FLUX.1-dev (slower, ~45s, higher quality). With a tight time budget, you must pick the right one. Speed-first persona expects you to use schnell.

input.prompt: a modern office with natural lighting

description: Given an English audio file, produce a podcast pipeline: transcribe, then translate to French AND Spanish, then re-synthesize both translations as audio via Edge-TTS. Output transcript plus both translated audio URLs.
Generate an AI-art QR code that encodes the given URL, styled to match the theme description.
Given a low-resolution image containing text, enhance it first (for better OCR), then extract the text, then translate it to Hindi.
Localize an English speech into 4 languages. Given an English audio clip, produce French, Spanish, Hindi, and German audio versions plus transcripts. Requires 9 Space calls total.

Localize a PDF: extract text, summarize, translate summary to French and Japanese, extract entities from original, classify sentiment, and generate audio narration in both target languages. 8 Space calls total.

Turn an image into a localized multimedia story. Caption image, expand caption to prompt, generate new stylized image, caption new image, write a story combining both, translate story to Spanish, synthesize story audio. 7 Space calls.

Deep meeting analysis. From meeting audio: diarize speakers, transcribe each speaker, extract entities per speaker, analyze sentiment per speaker (3 speakers), summarize minutes, translate summary to Spanish. 8 Space calls.

Produce a global news brief from mixed sources. Given an audio clip and a PDF report, extract and summarize both, combine summaries, translate combined to French, extract entities, assess sentiment, synthesize a French audio narration. 7 Space calls.

MARATHON: Build a comprehensive multimedia news package under evolving requirements. Task requirements drift mid-episode multiple times, forcing the agent to adapt pipelines, re-read cards, and recover from contract changes. 60 actions allowed.

MARATHON: Forensic investigation on evidence. Process audio testimony, transcribe and translate it, extract entities for cross-referencing, run parallel sentiment per segment, produce multi-language reports. Heavy drift simulates changing court requirements. 55 actions.
